授業の概要・背景: In this class, students will read and watch videos on world topics and events and practice expressing their ideas by writing and speaking in English. In particular, the following points will be focused: 1) improving English pronunciation through shadowing, 2) improving listening and reading skills, 3) expressing their thoughts and opinions in the form of writing and speaking. Students will also give mini-presentations based on the topics they choose.
授業方法: The class is conducted in a face-to-face format including simultaneous and two-way sessions. In this course, you will do several input and output activities either in a pair or group by using the textbook and do the assignments on LUNA after the lecture and submit the assignment by the deadline. You will follow several steps (reading the passage, watching the video, writing your opinions and practicing giving a mini-speech) so that you will be better prepared for the mini-presentation in each unit. You will do both individual and group works to prepare for your mini-presentation for each unit. On the final day, you will give a longer presentation to show your improvement from the daily practices. ＊For questions, you can use KG Email or LUNA.

トピック.授業外学習2: You need to check the announcement and assignments on LUNA every Thursday 3rd period. You must submit the assignments on LUNA by the deadline (within a week, by the next class meeting hour). Of course, you need to read the textbook and review the new words you have not learned yet.

教科書/Required texts0: Integrity Intermediate: Vitalize your English studies with authentic videos
教科書/Required texts1: Osamu Takeuchi, Tomoko Yabukoshi, Yukie Shinhara, Brent Cotsworth
学生による授業評価の方法Course Evaluation by Student: 学位授与方針（DP）「グローバル化する市民生活に不可欠な実践的学習能力とスキルおよびコミュニケー ション能力を有する。」および、教育課程の編成・実施方針（CP）「複数の言語によるコミュニケーション能力を習得し、多文化理解を促すことを目的とする科目。」に対応している。各授業科目は、各学部・研究科の定めるディプロマ・ポリシー（DP）・カリキュラム・ポリシー（CP）に基づき、カリキュラム上に配置されています。DP・CPを意識して本授業科目の学修を進めることで、各学部・研究科の期待する能力が養成されます。各学部・研究科のDP、CPや教育課程表（授業科目一覧等）は、下記リンクこちらに掲載していますので学修計画の参考にしてください。https://kwic.kwansei.ac.jp/cabinet/reference?typeCd=0&cabinetId=557&directLink=1※kwicへのリンクとなります（在学生のみ閲覧可）
